view.title: Validate persona scenario #4

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of waiting for sold-out group events.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of waiting for sold-out group events, but the evidence does not provide sufficient details to confirm the necessary requirements. Specifically, there is no evidence of the waitlist position for customers, payment transactions for the $5 fee, or automatic offer generation when a slot opens. These gaps indicate that the validation cannot be conclusively assessed at this time.

gaps: No evidence of waitlist position for customers in the queue.
No evidence of payment transaction for the $5 fee to join the waitlist.
No evidence of automatic offer generation when a slot opens.
